title: FAQ 1 - Consequences of Unpaid Payroll Deductions
ocr_text:
THE TAX & MONEY SHOW
Tuesdays at 9PM
Eastern Time
LIVE ON:
FreedomReport.ca
Question #1
What are the immediate consequences of unpaid payroll deductions?
• Will the CRA freeze my bank accounts, garnish receivables, or seize assets right away?
• How quickly do they move on enforcement once arrears are identified?
